methods.name: reportSalesByCategory
methods.description: This method retrieves sales data categorized by product categories.

methods.name: reportSalesByStore
methods.description: This method retrieves sales data aggregated by individual stores.

methods.name: reportSalesByCategory
methods.description: Generates a report of sales categorized by product categories.

methods.name: reportSalesByStore
methods.description: Generates a report of sales aggregated by individual stores.

methods.name: getStoreList
methods.description: Retrieves a paginated list of stores.

methods.name: getStore
methods.description: Fetches a store by its unique identifier.

methods.name: getStoreDetailsList
methods.description: Returns a list of detailed information about all stores.

methods.name: getStoreDetails
methods.description: Obtains detailed information about a specific store.

methods.name: getStoreStaffList
methods.description: Lists all staff members associated with a specific store.

methods.name: getStoreStaff
methods.description: Retrieves information about a specific staff member in a store.

methods.name: checkInventoryStock
methods.description: Checks the inventory stock for a specific film in a store.

methods.name: addStore
methods.description: Creates and adds a new store to the system.

methods.name: addStoreStaff
methods.description: Adds a new staff member to a specific store.

methods.name: updateStore
methods.description: Updates the information of an existing store.

methods.name: updateStoreStaff
methods.description: Modifies the details of a specific staff member in a store.

methods.name: deleteStore
methods.description: Removes a store from the system using its identifier.

methods.name: removeStoreStaff
methods.description: Deletes a staff member from a specific store.
